classification.task_goal: Modify code to ensure text is typed only when Ctrl, Alt, and Shift are pressed simultaneously.
primary_constraints: Typing should only occur when Ctrl, Alt, and Shift are pressed simultaneously.
Settings should not apply when the cancel button is pressed.
classification.reasoning: The assistant initially provided code that did not enforce the simultaneous key press requirement and allowed settings to apply even when the cancel button was pressed. The user pointed out these issues, prompting the assistant to make corrections, thus repairing the constraints.
